message:
🐛 Fix deploy events lost after page reload

saveMissions() was stripping logs from ALL missions before persisting
to localStorage. Completed missions past the 5-minute poll cutoff
would never re-fetch logs, leaving "Waiting for events..." permanently.

Two fixes:
- Persist logs for completed (orbit/abort) missions in localStorage
- Allow one additional poll cycle for completed missions with no logs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
